text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, you're covered in mud, kitty! Sit still so I
can wipe all that off you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! How'd you reach the very top of the
playground equipment so fast?! You'll catch a
cold up there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hang in there, kitty! I'm coming, so there's
nothing to be scared abo—ack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An obstacle course of swings, slides, and the like
keeps Mejiro Palmer from reaching the cat and
exhausts her instead...
